annotator_1.text: RL agents often exhibit unstable or degraded performance when deployed in environments subject to unexpected external disturbances and model uncertainties.

annotator_1.text: The training process is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.
annotator_1.source_quote: The training process is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.

annotator_1.text: The user learns a robust policy that minimizes the objective function, while the adversary generates disturbances that maximize it.

annotator_1.text: The proposed MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against both external force perturbations and model parameter variations.

annotator_2.text: Reinforcement learning has achieved remarkable success in a wide range of control and decision-making tasks.
annotator_2.source_quote: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved remarkable success in a wide range of control and decision-making tasks.

annotator_2.text: RL agents often exhibit unstable or degraded performance when deployed in environments subject to unexpected external disturbances and model uncertainties.

annotator_2.text: Ensuring reliable performance under conditions of external disturbances and model uncertainties remains a critical challenge for RL.

annotator_2.text: MMDDPG is a framework for learning disturbance-resilient policies in continuous control tasks.
annotator_2.source_quote: In this paper, we propose minimax deep deterministic policy gradient (MMDDPG), a framework for learning disturbance-resilient policies in continuous control tasks.

annotator_2.text: The MMDDPG training process is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.
annotator_2.source_quote: The training process is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.

annotator_2.text: In MMDDPG, the user learns a robust policy that minimizes the objective function.

annotator_2.text: In MMDDPG, the adversary generates disturbances that maximize the objective function.
annotator_2.source_quote: while the adversary generates disturbances that maximize it.

annotator_2.text: MMDDPG introduces a fractional objective that balances task performance and disturbance magnitude.
annotator_2.source_quote: To stabilize this interaction, we introduce a fractional objective that balances task performance and disturbance magnitude.

annotator_2.text: The fractional objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances.
annotator_2.source_quote: This objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances

annotator_2.text: The fractional objective promotes robust learning.
MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against external force perturbations compared to baseline methods.
annotator_2.source_quote: Experimental evaluations in MuJoCo environments demonstrate that the proposed MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against both external force perturbations

annotator_2.text: MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against model parameter variations compared to baseline methods.

annotator_2.text: MMDDPG was evaluated experimentally in MuJoCo environments.
